feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: DC Universe is safe
entry.content: James Gunn has the trust and approval of David Ellison. Gunn's DC Universe will keep going according to plans post-merger. >“He’s pretty open to what we’re doing. We do have a slate and a lot of it — obviously, Clayface is already coming out. We already have the Lanterns TV show. On those things, the train’s left the station. So we’re good. But he’s a big fan, he’s been great with us. He’s giving us kind of what we want. So far, everything’s good.” https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/m ovies/movie

entry.title: /b/ Random: i don't understand why life keeps sending me these messages if i can't do anythi…
entry.content: i don't understand why life keeps sending me these messages if i can't do anything with the 'information' (not strictly information), it's like i'm being informed of something, but with no particular purpose for the message...what is this? it has happened so many times, and i have never felt like i was any closer to figuring this shit out.

entry.content: How did it happen? Interested in both perspectives. Woke up to my bros mom sucking my dick once (half brother) was 19 had passed out at their place hafter a party she got me hard then rode me, we never spoke about it. I was so fucked up I could barely walk to the bathroom. Didn't move hardly the whole time she fucked me. #2 blonde cheerleader type passed out drunk carried her home before fucking her repeatedly, she woke for like ten seconds to say "yes, yesss" and blacked out. Changed her clothe

entry.title: /mu/ Music: That DAW sound...
entry.content: Something hollow, fake, lame about the DAW sound. Not enough of a human feel, and the 'humanize' functions don't seem to do the trick. Womenpop and Gpop are especially vulnerable to being produced with that soulless DAW sound. Tweens seem to like it, but they can be trained to like any drivel. How do you avoid that soulless DAW sound? Keep the sidechaining to a minimum, keep compression turned off except on lead vocals (if you're a vocal music cuckold), stop quantizing, better DACs and ADCs help

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I know it's hard to get a grip on, kids, but people keep getting older. They don…
entry.content: I know it's hard to get a grip on, kids, but people keep getting older. They don't just reach some inconceivable benchmark--50 or, God, 60--and stop, Old in some absolute sense. The bones, the joints, the genitals, the juices, the delivery systems, and eventually the mind continue to break down, at an unpredictable pace in unpredictable ways. Leonard Cohen has had No Voice since he began recording at 33. But he has more No Voice today, at 70, than he did on Ten New Songs, at 67--the tenderness i

entry.title: /mu/ Music: This should have been a single album
entry.content: The tracklist should have been like: >1. Reunited >2. For Heavens Sake >3. Cash Still Rules >4. Visionz >5. As High As Wu-Tang Get >6. Older Gods >7. A Better Tomorrow >8. It's Yourz >9. Triumph >10. Impossible >11. Little Ghetto Boys >12. Bells of War >13. The MGM >14. Dogshit >15. Duck Seazon >16. Hellz Wind Staff >17. Heaterz Now we have an album that can go toe to toe with 36 chambers

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is it worth learning any programming language when you can just vibecode? I don'…
entry.content: Is it worth learning any programming language when you can just vibecode? I don't know shit about programming but I'd like to start but it gets me wonder if I should when there's an ai to do all the job for me. Personally, the whole vibecoding thing feels like a giant bubble where people throw away their knowledge and hope the ai will fix everything. Should I bother or if all what I've just said is total bullshit and I should go full ai?

It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The expanding social media ban across the world, a little specific in the UK.
entry.content: I think, as an above 16 year old user, that the social media banning and internet censorship that has been happening since I believe 2023 is DISGUSTING. All of this censorship in multiple countries for the internet, which was originally made for free communication, is an ever-expanding thing that's slowly step-by-step taking away some or even most freedoms. Especially in the UK where by the year 2027, users under 16 wont be allowed on big social media platforms, but YouTube kids will be an excep

entry.title: /int/ International: >Wikipedia still can't be sold. >June 23: If you're in Greece, please read befor…
entry.content: >Wikipedia still can't be sold. >June 23: If you're in Greece, please read before time runs out. >You deserve an explanation, so please don't skip this 1-minute read. It's Tuesday, June 23. Our fundraiser won't last long, and we might not hit our goal. If you've lost count of how many times you've visited Wikipedia this year, we hope that means it's given you at least €2.75 of knowledge. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Only Japanese company left
entry.content: Are Nintendo the only Japanese company left? Sony is more western than Japanese. Even though the hardware are made outside Japan, the software and design is still very much Japanese. Ever since the PS4, Cerny who is white has been designing every PlayStation console. PlayStations are designed, made and programmed by non Japanese people, meanwhile with Nintendo it's just the hardware that's not Japanese but everything else is. If you like Japan and Japanese games, you gotta stick with Nintendo.

entry.title: /int/ International: Humanity peaked here
entry.content: I am reading primary accounts of spanish exploration starting from columbus, and it feels like this is where humanity peaked. A lot of it even feels like material for movies and games. We see ordinary people setting out on adventure, then coming across mystical novelties from naked primitive tribes, to fierce cannibals, to cities floating on water. Reading about how they triumphed over obstacles and the meeting of two different worlds is the best aspect. Is this where the human race peaked in hi

entry.title: /int/ International: Did you know Brussels is supposed to be bilingual between french and dutch but t…
entry.content: Did you know Brussels is supposed to be bilingual between french and dutch but the french bully the dutch side so much that the dutch side had to implement laws that french wasn't allowed to be spoken solely anymore? It's all a lost battle since even arabic speakers make up a bigger portion of the demographics than the dutch speaking. Fun fact: dutch speakers count for more votes in the parliament, so now muslim parties are just talking in broken dutch so they can get a seat at the table.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: At the end of the day we can say that Autechre are the only ones from the so cal…
entry.content: At the end of the day we can say that Autechre are the only ones from the so called 'big four' of IDM music that remained truly innovative, shapeshifting and radical in their vision of sound in more than 35 years of career. Also the only ones that remained active live without interruption. All other ones have faded into irrelevancy or became just TikTok background music. Boreferno by BoC is the latest confirmation of this undisputable fact.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Imagine you're a slave owner in 18th century British North America, your lady is…
entry.content: Imagine you're a slave owner in 18th century British North America, your lady is gone with her retinue of female slaves, and you only got one male black slave to order around and do stuff for you. Then when the night comes, the bed feels empty and you feel lonely. Despite the humid subtropical summer heat, you still wish for some human affection. Do you: >reach for a stuffed animal >summon the black slave boy (but ONLY for the purposes of consensual hugging) ?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: APPLE: SCHIZO REFUSAL SHOWCASE
entry.content: >try to make apple ID >enter valid personal email address >enter valid personal phone number >nope! We just won't let you make an account. Fuck you! Imagine if this shit happened on a brand new M1 Mac or some other shitty apple product someone bought. >Why are you making an apple id if you don't have an apple product? There are lots of reasons.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Now that KDE has fxed its krashes and klitches, using it after GNOME is like wak…
entry.content: Now that KDE has fxed its krashes and klitches, using it after GNOME is like waking from a bad dream and breathing again. The contrast is so big it really makes you realize how unusable GNOME really was all along. Just look at this screenshot, how the title bar no longer takes an inch of screen space.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To Ears #45
entry.content: Oh, dearest Ears, come gather 'round, Though heavy is your stride, We hear your stomach make a sound From cravings left inside. You traded carbs for bowls of fat, A tragic, self-made wreck, Stuck scrolling through our food format, You absolute KetoKek. For two whole days, the kitchen gleamed, The water reached a boil, While fresh, delicious soba steamed, And veggies snapped in oil. We dipped those noodles, rich and cool, A double-header treat! While you sat drowning in your drool, Forbidden from

entry.title: /mu/ Music: This Girl's In Love With You [Atlantic, 1970] If Soul '69 didn't convince me she…
entry.content: This Girl's In Love With You [Atlantic, 1970] If Soul '69 didn't convince me she was built for standards, then this lp convinces me she's better suited to lightweight pop novelties such as the title song and "Son of a Preacher Man" than overwrought rock statements such as "Eleanor Rigby" and "The Weight." I admit, when she sings "The Weight" she sounds as if she really knows what all the words mean. But I still don't. B+

A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. entry.title: /news/ News: Actually castes are good now.
entry.content: https://www.city-journal.org/articl e/india-caste-system-discrimination -new-york New York State lawmakers recently rejected a bill that would have added “caste” to the state’s anti-discrimination code. Had it passed, it would have made New York the first state—following a failed attempt in California—to enshrine the Indian system of social hierarchy in its law, adding yet another category to the ever-growing list of DEI concerns. The battle, however, is far from over. Thanks to activists pushin

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Let’s make this the best game of all time.
entry.content: This is Mayan's Angry Bird (Link: https://niborious.itch.io/mayansang rybyrb ), a masterpiece of pure minimalism drawn entirely on MS Paint. I’m just giving you the spark, now it’s up to you to turn it into the ultimate internet legend. Spread the word everywhere: praise it on forums, make dedicated videos about it, create deep philosophical theories, and treat it in every corner of the web as the definitive artwork of our generation. Do whatever it takes to crown it as the absolute myth of the
